title: microseris borealis
intro: Microseris borealis, also known as the sandwort or false chamomile, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Microseris borealis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Microseris borealis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
